creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Kaviar from comment #0)
Your update seems to be incomplete then. The file /var/run/os-release which /etc/os-release is linked to is generated on boot by rc.d script. You have either not completed update or the script is not enable. Please check the output of commands:

sysrc osrelease_enable

uname -UK
